questions.q: Which South Korean artist's 'Gangnam Style' music video became YouTube's first video to reach one billion views?

YouTube's 'Community' feature, introduced around 2016, allows creators to share which types of content with their subscribers outside of traditional videos?

questions.q: Which YouTube comedian and personality created the series 'My Drunk Kitchen,' which helped establish comedic vlogging as a major content category?
What major milestone did YouTube achieve in February 2017 when it announced viewership of over 1 billion hours watched per day?
choices: First platform to surpass Netflix in viewership

choices: None of these individuals held that position

An eye-catching but misleading video preview image designed to increase clicks
